commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

Add SQL editor with syntax highlighting, autocompletion, and query formatter

Replace plain TextEditor with a custom NSTextView-based SQL editor featuring
token-based syntax highlighting (keywords, strings, comments, numbers, operators),
autocompletion from SQL keywords and database metadata (schemas, tables, columns),
and a Beautify button that formats queries with proper indentation and auto-quotes
mixed-case identifiers for PostgreSQL compatibility.

Also fix empty query results showing "Query executed successfully" instead of
column headers when a SELECT returns 0 rows — now resolves column names from
table metadata via information_schema.

New files:
- SQLFormatter.swift: Token-based SQL tokenizer and formatter
- SQLSyntaxColors.swift: Adaptive light/dark mode colors
- SQLTextStorage.swift: NSTextStorage subclass for live highlighting
- SQLCompletionProvider.swift: Completion candidates from keywords + DB metadata
- SQLEditorView.swift: NSViewRepresentable wrapping NSTextView

commit.message:
fix: ADO push/PR creation fails because sanitized remote URL lacks @ for regex match

The URL parsing regex in push() and fetchBranch() required an @ in the
remote URL ([^@]*@), but after clone the URL is sanitized to strip the
token, so the regex never matched. This caused garbage URL construction
(org="https:", project="", repo="dev.azure.com"), failing the push
silently and leaving the branch missing on the remote — resulting in
TF401398 when createPR ran.

Also defensively strip refs/heads/ prefix in ADO PR creation to guard
against defaultBranch being stored with the full ref path.

commit.message:
feat: LINE webhook diagnostics — self-service debugging without Cloudflare logs

Add 3 diagnostic endpoints + owner UI card for webhook troubleshooting:

A. GET /api/line/webhook/diagnostics?tenantId=
   - Config status (secret/token/destination/AI/internal token)
   - Last webhook receipt + last processing result
   - Problem list with actionable hints

B. POST /api/line/webhook/debug-simulate?tenantId=
   - Simulates webhook branching for given text
   - Returns branch, intent, salesLabel without calling LINE API
   - Safe read-only operation

C. GET /api/line/webhook/last-result?tenantId=
   - Returns last webhook processing result from KV
   - Includes branch, reply status, error reason, timestamp

D. Owner UI (/owner/sales-lines)
   - Webhook diagnostics card with status badges
   - Ready/NotReady, Secret, Token, Destination, Flow type
   - Problems list, last webhook, last result display
   - Inline branch simulation (text input + execute)

Workers: POST/GET /internal/line/last-result (KV persistence, 7d TTL)
Webhook: persists result to KV after every processing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(sync): include TARGET_DIRS in post-ORGANIZE sync report

After ORGANIZE moves files from BASE_DIRS to TARGET_DIRS, the
subsequent full SYNC only scanned BASE_DIRS, so moved files' new
paths were never reported to the server. Now passes
include_target=True to scan both directories, allowing the server
to update file_paths via UPSERT.

commit.message:
Track E: parsing completeness for parseFrameHeader (#1108)

* feat: parseFrameHeader completeness theorem (Track E)

Add `frameHeaderMinSize` helper computing minimum header size from the
descriptor byte, and prove `parseFrameHeader_succeeds`: when data has
the correct Zstd magic number and enough bytes (as determined by
`frameHeaderMinSize`), `parseFrameHeader` returns `.ok`.

The proof generalizes descriptor byte fields (singleSegment, didFlag,
fcsFlag) into shared variables, then case-splits on singleSegment
and walks through remaining guards via `repeat (first | contradiction
| omega | split at hres)`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: progress entry for parseFrameHeader completeness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: add completeness proof pattern to lean-monad-proofs skill

Documents the backward approach for proving monadic functions succeed:
- cases hres gives rfl in ok branch (not hres)
- generalize to synchronize case analysis across hypotheses
- Bool.false_eq_true + ite_false to reduce for omega

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix critical gaps: Bash file detection, watch before-state, orphan cleanup

- Pre-hook: saves full project mtime map before Bash commands
- Post-hook: filesystem scan compares pre/post mtimes to detect ALL files
  changed by Bash (not just regex-extracted ones), including new + deleted
- Watch mode: reads file content on initial scan for true before-state,
  uses content hashing (not just mtime), debounces rapid changes (500ms)
- rewind clean: removes orphaned checkpoints, empty entries, stale temp
  files, orphaned tasks and sessions
- Increased post-hook timeout to 10s for Bash filesystem scanning

commit.message:
Add UTA number field for ICICI Bank access

Changes:
- Added UTA (ICICI Access Number) field in ICICI-specific fields section
- UTA is required for ICICI Bank (along with MID)
- Updated validation logic to require UTA for ICICI
- Stores iciciUta in bank configuration data
- Updated bank requirement note to mention UTA requirement
- Clear UTA field when bank changes or form resets

ICICI Requirements:
- Merchant ID (MID) - Required
- UTA Number - Required (NEW)
- Settlement Account - Optional
- VPA - Required
- IFSC - Required

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

non-clickable on WhatsApp. Now enforces 2-3 sentence max, no bullet
points, and link on its own line with clear spacing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(accelerator): logging hardening, tray-only UX, crash recovery (#167)

## Summary

- **Tray-only UX**: Hide from macOS Dock
(`ActivationPolicy::Accessory`), dedicated tray icon with
`icon_as_template` for dark/light mode, `image-png` Tauri feature
- **Logging hardening**: Truncate bb stderr to 500 chars (prevents
witness/bytecode leaks), add `EnvFilter` with `RUST_LOG` support, move
sizes/timing to DEBUG level, 7-day log retention via
`RollingFileAppender` builder, remove filesystem paths from health
endpoint
- **Crash recovery**: macOS LaunchAgent `KeepAlive` plist patching on
autostart enable, Linux systemd user service with `Restart=on-failure`

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo test` — 27 tests pass
- [x] `bun run test` — all lint, typecheck, unit tests pass
- [x] `cargo tauri dev` — app starts, tray icon appears, not in Dock
- [x] Health endpoint returns sanitized JSON (no filesystem paths)
- [x] Log files created with daily rotation naming convention

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Remove all remaining fake data from vendor dashboard

- Event mini-list: removed 4 hardcoded fake events (Port Adelaide, Norwood, Prospect, Victor Harbor) — populated entirely by loadEvents() from real API
